Log Aggregation Setup with ELK Stack: Application logs from all services are shipped to Elasticsearch via Filebeat agents running as DaemonSets on each Kubernetes node. The Logstash pipeline applies grok filters to parse structured JSON logs, enriches events with Kubernetes metadata (pod name, namespace, node), and applies drop filters to suppress noisy health check logs that generate high volume with no diagnostic value. Kibana dashboards provide real-time visibility into error rates, response time distributions, and business KPI events extracted from application logs. Index lifecycle management (ILM) policies roll over active indices at 50GB or 30 days, transitioning older data to warm and cold tiers before deletion at 90 days.
